title: nephrodium fragrans
intro: Nephrodium fragrans is a type of fern commonly known as the Fragrant Lady Fern, which belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the medicinal properties of Nephrodium fragrans were utilized to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural diuretic. Nephrodium fragrans is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
